title: fpsdisplaymod
description:
A colorful display of your current fps
red = bad, yellow = ok, green = playable, purple = fantastic
body:
![BAnner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af9b8aba0d84f89bcff843e0184ddf5f9939bf2d_0.webp)

### Features
 - Allows you to display your fps (on/off in config file) with colors.
